text: Our sustainability approach focuses on circular design, lower carbon materials, recycled fibres, and climate action across product development and operations.
We aim to make fashion more sustainable through recycled inputs, climate targets, circular business models, and progress toward net zero emissions.
Our ESG and sustainability programme highlights recycled materials, packaging improvements, energy efficiency, and partnerships intended to support lower-impact growth.
Fast Retailing reports sustainability goals covering climate action, recycled materials, circular initiatives, and long-term reductions in carbon emissions.
Primark Cares describes more recycled fibres, durable design, reduced waste, and a broader sustainability plan linked to climate and circular product goals.
The group states sustainability priorities around more sustainable materials, lower carbon operations, product traceability, and support for responsible sourcing.
